Operation 'getProfile' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. The original summary is generic and doesn't emphasize the authentication requirement. The description lacks critical details about what specific information is returned (CustomerProfile schema), authentication requirements, and the need for a valid access token. Enhanced version clarifies the authentication dependency, specifies the response schema, and helps AI agents understand when this operation is applicable and what data they can expect.

data.current_description: Retrieve the authenticated customer's profile information.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the authenticated customer's profile information including account details and preferences. Requires OAuth2 authentication. Returns a CustomerProfile object containing the customer's personal information and account settings. This operation requires a valid access token obtained through the Authorization endpoints.
data.reasoning: The original summary is generic and doesn't emphasize the authentication requirement. The description lacks critical details about what specific information is returned (CustomerProfile schema), authentication requirements, and the need for a valid access token. Enhanced version clarifies the authentication dependency, specifies the response schema, and helps AI agents understand when this operation is applicable and what data they can expect.

message: Operation 'getToken' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity about authentication requirements, return value structure, and when to use each grant type. Added details about basic auth requirement, TokenResponse schema reference, and use case guidance for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Obtain an OAuth2 access token using client credentials or authorization code grant.
data.description_suggestion: Obtain an OAuth2 access token for API authentication using either client credentials or authorization code grant flow. Requires basic authentication with client_id and client_secret. Returns a TokenResponse object containing the access token, token type, expiration time, and scope. Use client credentials flow for server-to-server authentication or authorization code flow for user-delegated access.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about authentication requirements, return value structure, and when to use each grant type. Added details about basic auth requirement, TokenResponse schema reference, and use case guidance for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'authorize' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary 'Authorize customer' is vague about the flow type. Description lacks detail about the redirect mechanism, parameter requirements, and how the authorization code is used. Enhanced to clarify this is part of OAuth2 authorization code flow and explain the complete process for AI agents.

data.current_description: Redirect customers to this endpoint to authorize your application and obtain an authorization code.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates the OAuth2 authorization code flow by redirecting the customer to Kroger's authorization endpoint. The customer logs in and grants your application permission to access their account. Upon approval, redirects to your specified redirect_uri with an authorization code that can be exchanged for an access token via the getToken endpoint. Requires client_id, redirect_uri, response_type, and scope parameters.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Authorize customer' is vague about the flow type. Description lacks detail about the redirect mechanism, parameter requirements, and how the authorization code is used. Enhanced to clarify this is part of OAuth2 authorization code flow and explain the complete process for AI agents.

message: Operation 'getProduct' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and appropriate. Description is too generic and doesn't explain what 'detailed information' includes or mention the Product schema. Added specifics about return value and location-scoping capability for better AI agent understanding of available data.

data.current_description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific product by its ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific product by its ID. Returns a Product object containing pricing, availability, images, nutrition information, and other product details. Location-specific pricing and availability can be obtained by including a store location ID parameter.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and appropriate. Description is too generic and doesn't explain what 'detailed information' includes or mention the Product schema. Added specifics about return value and location-scoping capability for better AI agent understanding of available data.

message: Operation 'getLocation' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and appropriate. Description is too generic about 'detailed information'. Added specifics about Location schema contents and contextual guidance about typical usage pattern (search then get details) to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific store location.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific store location by its ID. Returns a Location object containing store address, phone number, operating hours, services offered, and other store details. Use this to get comprehensive store information after identifying a location via searchLocations.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and appropriate. Description is too generic about 'detailed information'. Added specifics about Location schema contents and contextual guidance about typical usage pattern (search then get details) to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'addToCart' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks authentication requirements, input format details, return value information, and side effects. Added specifics about OAuth2 requirement, request body structure, cart response details, and persistence behavior for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Add one or more items to the authenticated customer's cart.
data.description_suggestion: Add one or more items to the authenticated customer's cart. Requires OAuth2 authentication with user-delegated access. Accepts a request body with product IDs and quantities. Returns the updated cart state including all items, quantities, and calculated totals. Items are persisted to the customer's account and remain in the cart across sessions.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks authentication requirements, input format details, return value information, and side effects. Added specifics about OAuth2 requirement, request body structure, cart response details, and persistence behavior for comprehensive AI agent understanding.
